title: Ada Sci Fi
description: Changes the appearance of many vanilla items to be more science fiction-esque !
body:
ADA Sci Fi is a vanilla resource pack that aims to replace boring vanilla textures with cooler, Sci Fi textures! 

Good for space themed servers and modpacks !

Current Sci-Fi Additions: 

The Spickle (Potato)
The Legumber (Carrot)
The Aubun (Beetroot)
The Vanza (Apple)

- And all variants of these items !
